'''Ariela''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] from [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] who later lived on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].

==Biography==
Ariela supported [[Ariq Joanson]]'s idea to make peace with the [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raiders]] and the [[Jawa/Legends|Jawas]]. She was in love with [[Eyvind/Legends|Eyvind]], who, at their wedding, was killed by Tuskens. She was then captured by the Sand People, but later saved by [[Ariq Joanson]] and [[Wimateeka]].

{{Char-stub}}
